about.title: Timekeeping, refined to its essence
about.body: Each Violet timepiece unites precision movements with quiet, considered design — built to carry a sense of authenticity and confidence across borders. Restraint, made to last.

success.title: Thank you, {name}

side.title: Prefer to buy in person?
side.body: Violet is carried by authorised retailers across Europe, Russia, and the Middle East. Tell us your country in the form and we'll point you to your nearest dealer.

hero.body: Every element below — the monogram, the champagne palette, the engraved type and the guilloché — is drawn directly from the Collection 2026 master.

mark.title: A monogram, a wordmark, one lockup
mark.sub: The calligraphic V is the signature; the engraved VIOLET wordmark gives it voice. Use the full medallion lockup for primary placements, the horizontal lockup for headers, and the bare monogram as an app or favicon mark.

palette.title: Aubergine leads, champagne signs
palette.sub: Primary is the deep aubergine of the master field; secondary is the champagne gold reserved for signatures, rules and rare premium actions. Neutrals are tinted toward the aubergine so the whole system feels of one ink.

type.title: Engraved, calligraphic, composed
type.sub: Two faces carry the identity; two carry the interface. Cinzel engraves the wordmark, Pinyon Script signs the monogram, Cormorant Garamond sets heritage headlines, and Inter runs the UI.

texture.title: The floral lattice
texture.body: A six-petal damask drawn from the Collection 2026 master — seamless, recolorable line-work with the script V worked between the blooms. It belongs to dark hero fields, packaging, endpapers and certificates — never behind body copy.

application.title: One brand, two registers
application.sub: The dark aubergine register carries heroes and signatures; the light register carries the catalogue and the interface. Gold appears sparingly across both.

Product.description: A refined {line} timepiece — stainless steel, sapphire-clear mineral glass, and a balanced {mm} mm case on a {strap} strap. Designed in the Violet tradition of quiet, lasting elegance.
